subcodes.first_line: He—glorified be His mention—resembleth the sun. Were unnumbered mirrors to be placed before it, each would, according to its capacity
subcodes.first_line_orig: فان مثله جل ذکره کمثل الشمن لو یقابلنه الی ما لا نهایة مرایا کلهن لیستعکسن من تجلی الشمس
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @call to action, @differences in human capacity

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
